summary:
MILITARY AND GEOPOLITICAL VISIONS: Brandon details a vision concerning the USS Abraham Lincoln aircraft carrier and an accompanying smaller vessel. In this vision, a drone or missile strikes the flight deck, causing a massive explosion that throws crew members into the air. Brandon discusses the need for military personnel safety and mentions a liberation and regime change in Iran, referencing the biblical prophecies of Ezekiel 38 and 39. He also foresees global geopolitical shifts and discusses the disarming of nuclear programs.

DOMESTIC INFRASTRUCTURE THREATS AND TERRORISM: Brandon recounts a detailed vision of an attack on two black, glass twin-tower hotels located on the Chicago riverfront. He describes a massive internal explosion that shatters the buildings and causes heavy fires. Concurrently, an individual dressed in black, wielding a 30-06 wood-stock rifle, is seen on a nearby roof targeting incoming firefighters and emergency responders. Brandon also mentions a vision of a prominent 41st-floor building on a New York river. He states that these events are orchestrated distractions designed by elites to divert public attention away from the exposure of massive political and financial corruption.

ELITE SECRETS AND FINANCIAL CORRUPTION: Brandon describes a global masquerade party involving high-ranking politicians, Hollywood celebrities, sports figures, and musicians participating in a cultic brotherhood he identifies as the Illuminati. An elite hacker group tied to the name Anonymous attempts to extort a 40 million dollar ransom for hidden files. Following the failed ransom, massive exposure of dark secrets ensues, causing panic among prominent figures, including a former First Lady. Brandon notes that an individual akin to Edward Snowden will leak deeply buried secrets, including those from the Vatican. Additionally, he points to financial corruption and election fraud stretching across California, Seattle, and Portland, stating that Gavin Newsom will not reach the White House. He highlights independent journalists like Nick Shirley and Benny Johnson, who are investigating this corruption, urging protection for them.

GLOBAL PLAGUE AND THE CHURCH'S RESPONSE: Brandon shares recurring visions of a lab-created virus spread globally by rats, affecting Europe, Africa, South America, and Asia. This plague causes immediate death and leads to severe global shutdowns, empty grocery stores, and overwhelmed hospitals, prompting the deployment of a massive medical ship outside New York. In response, Brandon sees a remnant of the church dressed in white. These individuals go into tent cities and rural areas to lay hands on the sick, curing diseases and raising people from the dead. Brandon states that God instructed him to expand his faith and believe for larger miracles and a massive wealth transfer to the church.

PERSONAL INTEGRITY AND CHURCH PURIFICATION: Brandon discusses personal responsibility, hygiene, and stewardship. He shares anecdotes about maintaining a repossessed vehicle and cleaning a fellow churchgoer's infested car to illustrate the importance of taking care of possessions and treating others' property with respect. He addresses laziness and poor hygiene within the church, stating the importance of pursuing excellence in mundane tasks. Furthermore, Brandon mentions purification among church leaders, stating that those struggling with secret sins or false prophecies should step down from the pulpit. He states that divine judgment for hypocritical leaders will occur and emphasizes the necessity for the church to operate with biblical integrity.

SPIRITUAL WARFARE AND UPCOMING EVENTS: Brandon issues declarations against emerging diseases like the Nipah virus, rejecting future pandemics. He discusses a vision of a demonic, alien-like principality associated with the Oscars and foresees massive protests and political unrest in England and France. He also warns of rising anti-Semitism in major global cities. Brandon discusses the safety of upcoming major public events, including the Olympics and the Super Bowl, stating that plots of destruction will be thwarted by law enforcement and intelligence agencies. He concludes with mentions of protection for Donald Trump and his family, guidance for upcoming governmental appointments, and a sweeping national revival.
rawData: [February 01, 2026]-[Come pray with us]-[https://youtu.be/2AD5ytrJBAU]-[Good afternoon and good evening, family. Thank you for joining us again today. We're just going to go right into prayer; I won't keep you all too long. I told D, 'Let's surprise them and come on early today and see how the crowds are.' We've never really been on in the afternoons before. We always wait until the evenings so Australia can pray with us; they're usually in the middle of their day. I know a lot of people from Australia and New Zealand pray with us the later we get. We thought we would pray with you this afternoon and see who comes; it might be some from Europe. We have a lot to talk about. In our last prayer call, the Lord showed us a lot concerning this war and praying over our military men and women. That was a lot of detail, but the Lord will not allow me to go into much of it. I'll talk about some of the details I was shown. We were shown more about hotels on the Chicago riverfront, and I saw a major explosive device—I'll say it like that for the YouTube live—that went off in the middle of the hotel. There were two buildings side by side on a riverfront that were a hotel. I do not know what this is, but it looked like a black building. We'll go over that, and then we'll go over the Illuminati and what I saw about that; we'll just do the highlights and jump right into prayer. Let's go into what I saw about the aircraft carrier, the Abraham Lincoln. I don't know the difference between aircraft carriers, but I heard the name Abraham Lincoln and to pray over that particular boat. I saw another boat that was part of its entourage, like its buddies, attached to the Abraham Lincoln. When I was shown this explosion, it took place in the middle of that smaller boat off to the side. It was a long boat, and I could see the crew members being shot into the air. I don't know if they have anti-aircraft missiles on the inside that would protect them. In the middle of the flight deck where the planes take off, something came from above—whether it was a drone or a missile—and it caused the whole flight deck to explode. I saw crew members being blown off that deck and scattered all over the place. That's what happened in this vision; that was the moment I saw our crew members being taken out that way, and that's what we were praying for. Do we see an escalation so far? No. I'm believing we will have a liberation of the people without anybody getting hurt. When we were interceding yesterday, I prayed that we would not see anybody go to war and that they would disarm themselves, give away their nuclear program, and there would be liberation for the people. In the natural, you might ask, 'Brandon, is that possible?' Yes, all things are possible because I know Ezekiel 38 and 39 is about to take place. What does that look like if we had a regime change in Iran? I don't add to or take away from anything; all I know is this is what I saw. I saw other things concerning this that I cannot talk about, but these were the main things I can share publicly. We need to pray for them to really be on alert because I saw this stuff and thought, 'How do you pray into that?' I bounce these things off my team here, and we want to stop this because it is very serious for our servicemen and women. The other thing I was shown was the hotels and the glass fronts. It looked like a black glass building. There were two buildings that looked like twin towers. I know it was a hotel because the Lord said, 'This is a hotel.' It was on the riverfront of Chicago. When this device went off in the middle of the building, it caused mass glass to shatter and everything was on fire. It looked like a complete loss. As the firefighters and emergency responders were coming in, I saw an individual on another building with a 30-06 style rifle. It had a wood stock; it wasn't military-looking like an AR. It was a wood stock gun with a smaller scope. This was a normal-looking scope on this firearm. He was all in black, ready to take out emergency responders. I saw one firefighter drop immediately because of this individual. We will pray over our firefighters and that all hidden things will be discovered concerning Chicago hotels in the days ahead. It was a very prominent, detailed vision. I also saw the river in New York with a massive building on the 41st floor; the Lord said this was more dominant than the other one. It was very foggy. It wasn't as crisp. I don't know how else to describe it, but that's the way it looked. And that's when the Lord said, "You're focusing more right now on Chicago." So, that's what we saw. And then we were shown a masquerade party. I saw many men and women in masquerade masks. They were in all kinds of rich, very thick, beautiful hooded robes that looked like white and black, and they had fur collars around some of them with detailed masks that were—some of them had long noses and some of them didn't—but all of them had some kind of drawing or jewels or something on their faces for rank or whatever. I don't know what it was. I don't want to assume anything. But I saw these masks on these people. And the Lord said, "Illuminati." Now, does that mean they're having parties with masks on? I don't know. Is it symbolic? Could be. All I know is what I see and what I tell you what I see. And as I was shown this, I saw these people with these hoods on across America, across Europe, across Mexico, and across Australia. There was a group in Australia. There were people that were attached to some kind of a cultic brotherhood that was celebrities, Hollywood celebrities, sports people, music industry, you name it. And they were all major players in our world economy and things that we do. I could see the celebrities. I could see the sports people. I could name their names. I'm not going to; that would be stupid. But I could see their faces and I could see them, and it was symbolic. As I was seeing this, I saw major political figures, and I even kind of hinted to who one of them was in a darker area. When this was shown to me, I saw "Anonymous." It was painted before my face in a word, and I saw another mask—"Anonymous." And I saw an individual concerning this, and I'm not going to describe it. It doesn't matter. But I saw this individual that was a hacker, a computer hacker that was some kind of elite computer hacker group. The Lord said that they would get in the days ahead—these kinds of hackers were going to get some kind of secret information concerning like Epstein list stuff to expose darkness in major arenas, and they wanted a ransom: big money. Over $40 million is what I was shown. Big bucks. Well, to me it's big bucks. Maybe to you it's not, but to me, that's crazy life-changing. $40 million is a lot of money, you know. But there are some of y'all out there who'd be like, "48 million ain't nothing, Brandon." But to me, $40 million is a lot. I saw big money as a ransom for this, but they didn't get what they wanted. And I saw embarrassing moments coming for some celebrities. In particular, I saw a woman that was a First Lady that ran for president scrambling like a rat on a ship, like freaking out. I saw her face and she was freaking out for what was being leaked. She was the most dominant to me of anybody. Her husband that used to be president acted like he just couldn't care less. He acted like, "You know what? It's there. I'm old. What are you going to do about it?" Then I saw major key sports figures, huge people. I saw the Lakers. It was very bold. I saw the colors that were connected to this darkness. And I saw key figures with the Lakers, past and present; musicians that are here and some that are not. One of which I thought maybe I could say their name because he's dead, you know, Blue Eyes. And so I thought it was interesting. The Lord said this has been going on since the foundation of America, and it's underground. And he said the darkness that is being exposed will expose generations. And then he said, "This is going to be what we would call a new Edward Snowden in the days ahead that will even leak things out of the Vatican." There is new darkness that's coming that will be exposed through things that have been buried even in the Vatican. And there are things that will be brought to light. That's what the Lord said. And he said seed time and harvest is coming to its fullest potential. The sower and the reapers are going to go hand in hand, and it will rain on the just and the unjust. For what was sown in private, in secret, will be rewarded openly, and it will happen on the just and the unjust. You're going to see blessing and you're going to see judgment. Great judgment is coming to corrupted politicians and to people who are not just politicians. But I saw blessing and judgment, favor, increase, multiplication, and people that would be very embarrassed in the days ahead, humiliated by what they had done and thought that they would get away with it. This is even past sins. And I thought, isn't that interesting? I don't know how a hacker could find all that. It's me in my natural mind; I try to wrap my mind around what the Lord's saying. And it's probably not a healthy thing to do, but because this is me, I see the vision what the Lord's given me and I go, "Whoa, how even worse than what's been exposed this last two days with Bill Gates and the Russian girl and all that stuff and the things that were said on there and the emails and his wife and all that." That's very humiliating. I mean, to me, that's very humiliating for him, for somebody of his power. They said that was pretty gross. So, we see what's going on with all that. A lot of pictures, a lot of things, people talking about things a lot. And so, okay. So, how many minutes now? I'm trying not to talk too long. Twenty? Golly, man. How does that time go so quick? Where will we be in 2027 or 2028? That's the time frame. And when I saw the plague again and people talking about this plague, it's really starting to get media attention. And I was watching a YouTuber named Jason A, and he had a video about the plague and a lot of snippets of media clips about this virus X and all this new virus, and even had Alex Jones on there talking and saying all this stuff and how it's genetically created. They believe in a lab and that it—I told you it would be spread through animals and I saw rats, not bats, but I saw rats spreading this virus all throughout Europe. Well, do you show them that? You can show them what's going on with that. Don't—you don't have to show them the clip. Okay. Yeah, just the picture. Just show the picture, baby. So, they're all freaking out and it's what the Lord showed me that it would be created in a lab, and I saw them injecting it into the rat and releasing the rats into heavily populated areas and it was spreading and people were getting sick and after they got it they just died. It was just that fast. The more I've seen this and I'm praying over it, I saw it happening in Europe. And that's whenever I saw it would explode from there, and then do you remember how I saw the faces of each continent, of Africa, and it turned red—the face turned red and it faded out as the virus went through like some kind of movie screen for me? It was like a plague, and I saw it going through Africa. I saw it going down through South America and it went through all of Asia and it was spreading all over. But it looked like it was something like whenever you touch a pen to a paper and it bleeds, and that's the way it looked in the vision. It was bleeding. It was spreading like you would spread liquid. And I thought it was interesting, that vision. I have these visions and the Lord showed us—how many times has he shown us this plague? I can't even tell you how many times I have seen this, and that's usually when I know this is going to happen: when I see it so many times go over and over and over and the Lord keeps warning me to tell you all that something major—and I saw it start in January. It started to be on the news a little bit in November and December, and by January it was starting to hit hard and by February, March, April, May, June... and I saw May, that's whenever all the food and all the things were completely shut down all over the world. There were no grocery stores open. It was nothing like COVID. It was completely bare, like a ghost town everywhere. There were no churches. There was nothing. And then I saw people with white pants, white shoes, white suits, and white ties, and they had a honey glow all over them. And people go, "Well, Brandon, do you think they dipped themselves in honey?" No, it's a representation of the anointing. The glory was on them, not honey. They didn't take beehive honey and rub their body down with it to protect them from a virus. It was a representation of the glory of God on folks. The remnant, the church, the blood-bought, the redeemed were going out and laying hands on the sick with the power and the authority of the believer, and they were raising people up out of death. I saw a glorious church rising during this time with people in white. White was a representation of purity. It was a representation of what John G. Lake used to wear: a white suit, a white shirt. He was always wearing white patent leather shoes, the glory of God. Now people say, "Well, that's what one group of people would wear or whatever." I know this is what I saw as a type and shadow of the glorious church rising during this. And I saw them going into tents, tent cities with cots of sick, dying people, and they were laying hands on them, and the power of God was raising them up out of their deathbeds. Once the people got it, the hospitals were full and they had tents in parking lots of mega grocery stores because they had no place to put the bodies. Do you remember? I saw the major ship outside of it; it was a medical ship outside of New York. It had a big cross on it and it was a massive medical boat outside of New York because there was no place to put all of them. If you've been following my channel long enough, you know that I've seen a lot of these things, and I saw the medical boat. It looked like something out of a bad movie, some kind of zombie apocalypse. It looked like hell on earth there. Everybody was, but the glorious church. And that's what I'm talking about. They didn't have church in the city; they had church in rural areas, brush arbor churches with the glorious church. Well, I was in church today just praying and the Lord said, "People are not getting prepared enough. People are not believing me for bigger. They're not asking me for bigger. It's for me and my four and no more." He asked me to believe Him for more. He said, "Brandon, you need to enlarge your capacity to believe outside of what you think you know. Ask me for over and above all that you dare ask or think. Not to hoard, but to help people for what's coming. You must believe me for more." He said, "As I was listening and I was sitting there, I was not even there." I told Diana, I said I went off in another realm today. I don't even remember what was said behind the pulpit. He was talking to me so loud as I was sitting there; I couldn't even remember who was sitting by me. I went over into another realm and I was listening to the Father about what things are coming. And He said, "Brandon, you must believe me for bigger. Stop thinking so small." And He was correcting me. I got scalded. And I sat there and I thought because He asked me, He said, "What do you believe for February? What do you believe for the year? I need you to enlarge your belief system." Churches need to be built. Things need to happen. But it's going to take big bucks to do this, Brandon, and there's not many people that are believing me for it. There is a storm coming. Regardless of what you hear on some of these prophetic channels, there is a storm coming. It will shake the world in the days ahead. They say, "Well, I believe heaven on earth's coming." Yeah, with the glorious church, but it's going to be light in Goshen and it will be dark in Egypt. Goshen, sorry, Goshen. It will be the light in Goshen; there'll be dark in Egypt. Whenever the Egyptians were there and they had all the stuff going on, you had the glory of the Lord over the children of Israel. And that's what I'm trying to tell you is that we're a representation of the same thing. The Lord said to me, "I'm gonna provide for my people. I'm gonna put a protection around and about them." When I was trying to tell you about Psalm 91 and Psalm 23, this is what I'm trying to tell you: that you've got to prepare yourself for what's about to take place. It is dark in Egypt and light in Israel. Yeah, it was Goshen. I believe with all my heart that we're the representation of that, that we'll be the church without spot or wrinkle rising up with a backbone like a crowbar, being that light in these dark hours. And most people are still thinking about me and my four no more with that mentality of thinking, "How am I just going to get barely by to pay my electric, water, and gas?" And He said, "Start to stretch yourself to believe for more." And I'm like, "Okay, I can do it. Help me. I believe; help my unbelief." Diana and I believe; help our unbelief. Stretch us. I'm asking God to stretch you today to take you to the next level to believe Him for more. Now, do you believe all these things are going to happen, Brandon? I believe that's what Matthew 24 said. Now, is that fear? No. We're closers. We were made for pressure. We were built for such a time as this. It shouldn't shake us. Why? Because we've got what it takes. We're the closers of the game. He saved the best for last. Now, your grandma's generation probably couldn't have handled it. They'd probably freak out and crawl underneath their bed covers and hide themselves and sit and shake all day. But not us because there is some—we've got that oomph, that grit to sit there and say, "Listen, we will not bow. We will not burn. We will take the land for Jesus. We will rise up with a backbone and we will proclaim that Jesus Christ is coming, and He's coming sooner rather than later." He's coming. And I believe we're about to see this earth shaken like we've never seen it shaken before with signs and wonders, glorious healings and outpourings of the glory, the demonstrations and the manifestations—not just physical healings, but seeing people delivered of demonic spirits, seeing people raised from the dead, seeing blind eyes opened, ears opened, and the lame—all biblical stuff today. I go, "Well, how come we don't see that?" I'm believing God for it, and they're seeing it in foreign countries. I have people tell me, "Well, Brandon, we see miracles all the time in our church. We live over in Africa." The modern culture of America, we don't see it a lot. And it's about to change. We see certain things. You might hear somebody, "Well, I had a headache, brother, and I got healed." I go to Billy Burke's meetings and you see people get healed of really cool stuff. But it's not the rule; it's the exception. That happens all the time. Signs and wonders will follow them that believe. And that's what I'm expecting. It's not something we go, "Well, every once in a while in the sweet by and by, some sister might get healed of something and we'll hear about it." No, I want it to be so widespread that it takes over our churches and we see it, and people are drawn to it in the world and say, "What are they doing in there?" Did you know I heard about 10 people in there that got healed of cancer this last week? Send them over there if they have cancer. If they've got some kind of diabetes or heart disease, send them over because we know that if they go in there, the power and the glory of the Lord is going to raise them up out of their deathbed. Shock and awe. We're in the news. What is it? Did you hear another testimony of somebody getting up from the dead? Have you heard about anybody getting up from the dead? Not very often. It shouldn't be such a rarity—if ever. You go, 'Well, they were in the morgue for a couple of days.' Well, I really don't know. Is that AI? It should just be every day that we walk in the glory of God. And it's time to believe Him for bigger. He said it, 'Enlarge your capacity to believe Me,' not just for finances but for the demonstrations and manifestations of the glory, entertaining angels unaware, flowing with the gifts of the Spirit. Paul and Silas, bound in the prison, started singing. The walls began to shake. They're set free. You go, 'What happened?' Look at that! I wonder if we could go back in time and sit there and listen to their stories. What was their coffee time like in the morning? If they all gathered around, what did you see today? When they were there talking and they had family time, and they're all sitting around, do you remember when Uncle John went out and did this or that? Matthew went and did this or that. They're all in there, and we're having dinner together, eating figs or whatever they were doing and hanging out. Do you remember that one time we went into the marketplace and we saw that guy get up from the dead? I can't even imagine what their conversations were like, sitting there talking about the good old days. But it's time for us to have our days. I just try to believe Him. Stretch out and start to thank Him for what He's about to do in this generation. He told me, 'Brandon, I'm going to show up and show off, and I will make Myself known to this generation—that I am not a God of religion and what our grandmas used to tell us about.' No, it's time for our turn. It's time for this generation. He said, 'I'm going to visit this generation one more time with the greatest harvest of souls this world has ever seen before.' Brandon, it's time to believe Me for bigger. The old wells of revival are coming uncapped. Listening to Him, like He said, 'It's a great day to sell silver today.' Really? Well, that doesn't... okay. Well, it's a great day to buy some gold today if you could get two grand of it. It's a great day just following His voice. It's just an example. 'You see that piece of land over there? I don't know why, but if He said it, "Hey, that land right there is only a couple hundred dollars."' You go and you buy it, and the state comes in and says, 'We want to build a highway through here. We want to buy it from you for five million dollars.' I just know that God is a God that is able to do exceedingly abundantly above all that we dare ask or think. And if He can do it for one, He can do it for me. If He can do it for that person, He can do it for you. He's no respecter of persons. And if you're listening to Him, even whenever your mind doesn't make sense of it—'I don't understand this in my natural mind'—the natural man perceiveth not the things of the Lord. I refuse to be carnally minded. I want to be spiritually led. God, lead me in everything I put my hands to. Help me, because in my natural self, I just barely got a GED. But I know that the men of the Bible were uneducated men, but they had been with Jesus. That's what made them stand out. What makes you stand out is that you've been with Jesus because He'll put His super on your natural if you would just allow Him. 'Can I use you in these last days?' Here am I, Lord. Use me. All I've got is what You can use. This is it. You don't have much, but Lord, with what I have, You can use it. Do something with it. And He'll take whatever you've got. Like the widow lady who just barely had something. They just had the little bit of cornmeal and a little bit of oil to make a little cake, and they were going to die. But look what the man of God did. He blessed it. They fed it to him, and every pot filled with oil. They had all they could sell, and the blessing of the Lord was on it. Look at what God can do just with a little. He can turn it around and make it into much. I believe it's time to believe that the God of the Bible is the God of today. He has not changed. And what He did then—they didn't even have the covenant that we have. They were underneath the Abrahamic covenant. We have so much more. Jesus Christ dwells on the inside of you. He didn't dwell on the inside of them. We're wall-to-wall Holy Ghost. He dwells on the inside of us. As He is, so are we in this world. Now, we need to act like it and believe it. If He would do that for Shadrach, Meshach, and Abednego; if He would do that for Daniel, Moses, Abraham, or Samson; how much more could He do it for you? We have the Holy Spirit that dwells on the inside of us richly by faith. How much more can He do through us if we just say, 'Yes, God, here am I'? I just think it's interesting. I was sitting there today and He said, 'Enlarge your capacity to believe Me for more, Brandon. You think too small.' I thought I was thinking big for what we're believing for. I'm supposed to believe God. And He said, 'You're still not believing Me for enough.' And to wrap my mind around what He's asking me for... He said, 'Don't you realize what we have to do in these last days? We're at the end of this. The sun is setting on this dispensation of grace. Do you realize I'm standing at the door and the bride is asleep?' Most of them have no urgency of My coming. It's time to rattle the cages. It's time to wake them up. I'm coming. It's like when He said to the disciples, 'Could you not just pray with Me for one hour? The hour is at hand.' I refuse to be asleep behind the wheel. Come on, wake up. So, I've said enough, but I tried to tell you what He's saying to me and just taking that step with Him of intimacy. You don't tell your secrets to somebody you don't trust. You tell your secrets to somebody that you're intimate with. Can God share His secrets with you? Are you intimate with Him? And that's what He said. You don't tell your secrets to anybody other than Dina because you're intimate with her. She's your friend; it's more than that—we have a covenant. There's nothing that she doesn't know about me, and there's nothing that I don't know about her. There is an intimacy in a marriage where you know everything about that individual. And that was what the Lord was saying to me: there's intimacy, and the more you're intimate with Me, I'll tell you the secret things. But I don't share intimacy with people who are not intimate with Me. Become intimate with Me and I will be intimate with you. I will show you that which is to come. You say, "Well, I don't hear Him. He doesn't talk to me about that kind of stuff. Are you any better than me, Brent?" No, no, no. My decisions have been different. Maybe my walk with the Lord has been different. I don't know the time you spend with Him. I don't try to say, "Well, I'm self-righteous; I spend all these hours a day." No, it's quality time. It's intimacy. It's allowing Him in your thought pattern. It's allowing Him into your inner circle and inviting Him daily, not just every once in a while. And it's obeying Him even whenever your flesh doesn't want to. Your flesh will scream whenever He tells you to give certain things away and do certain things, and you'll go, "I will not do this." But it's being faithful with little, and He'll make you ruler over much. Whenever you're faithful with the small thing, God will bless you with the bigger thing. But until you become faithful with the little, don't you ask Him for more? People always ask Him, "Well, how come I can't go from here to there?" It starts out with just five dollars. Can you be obedient with a dollar? Can you be obedient with a hundred dollars? If you cannot be obedient with a dollar, how does He take you to a hundred dollars? He will not share His secret things with people He cannot trust. Prove yourself trustworthy in these last days, and He will show you the secret things and the hidden things. Be faithful with what He's given you, honor it, and take care of it. I don't know how many times I would take our clunky car to the car wash and wax a car with the paint coming off or wrecked. People said, "Why don't you replace that bumper?" I didn't have the money to. The bumper was falling off of our Honda Accord, and we didn't have the money to fix it. We had it zip-tied. We fixed that thing with Diana. But I always waxed and took care of that car falling apart. Even when they repoed it because we couldn't make our payments, they took it from us. It was falling apart, and I remember they came—and it's bad when you get a car repoed from you when the front bumper's off and there's so much stuff going on with it—but I kept it clean. And when they came up there and took it, I kept it clean. And the guy goes, "Man, he took care of it. You tried." Amen. Even whenever the bank came in and took it from us, I took care of it. You've been faithful even with what God's given you. Even if it's not that nice, you always take care of it. And when you borrow somebody else's car, you make sure it's full of gas and clean when you return it. Don't return it dirty and with an empty tank of gas. Always do good unto others. Bless them.
